name: dora-yolo
description: Object detection using Ultralytics YOLOv8. Accepts image frames and outputs bounding boxes with confidence scores, class labels, and annotated images.

ports.description: Image frame from camera or video source (bgr8, rgb8, or jpeg encoding).
Runtime confidence threshold override (float 0.0-1.0). When received, overrides the CONFIDENCE env var for subsequent frames.
Bounding boxes with confidence scores and class labels (struct array with bbox, conf, labels fields).
Annotated image with bounding boxes drawn, encoded as JPEG bytes.

model.description: YOLO model file name or path (e.g. yolov8n.pt, yolov8s.pt, yolov8m.pt).

format.description: Bounding box format: xyxy (x1,y1,x2,y2) or xywh (x,y,w,h).

confidence.description: Detection confidence threshold (0.0-1.0). Can be overridden at runtime via the confidence input port.
